attacking_style: Bunch sprint specialist who capitalizes on flat stage finales. Demonstrates patience to contest organized mass sprint finishes rather than attacking early.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team lead-out patterns across multiple races. Single observation shows ability to finish without visible dedicated train.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages at Tour de Pologne where race familiarity provides tactical advantage. Limited evidence for performance on other terrain types.
vulnerability: Unknown vulnerabilities due to limited dataset. No observations of climbing, time trial, or varied sprint scenarios to identify weaknesses.
key_patterns: Exceptional Tour de Pologne specialist: 12 career stage wins demonstrates sustained success at this race.
Pure sprinter profile: wins from bunch kicks rather than breakaway or reduced group scenarios.
form_trajectory: unknown: single 2017 observation insufficient to determine trajectory despite positive result at familiar race
